brand.name: PricePilot
footer.copy: Pricing analytics and profit optimization for e-commerce teams.
home.title: Price with margin, not guesswork.
home.subtitle: PricePilot helps e-commerce teams compare pricing strategies, forecast profit impact, and choose confident price moves before they reach customers.
home.proof1.label: Built for
home.proof2.label: Core workflow
home.proof2.value: Analyze one product or manage a portfolio
home.proof3.label: Outcome
home.proof3.value: Faster pricing decisions with clearer margin visibility
home.panel.title: A pricing decision system that stays business-first
home.panel.subtitle: PricePilot turns product, cost, demand, and competitive inputs into a clear pricing direction.
home.panel.item1.title: Recommended price move
home.panel.item1.description: See which strategy leads and what price point it supports.
home.panel.item2.title: Profit and margin visibility
home.panel.item2.description: Review revenue, profit, margin, ROI, and break-even in one view.
home.panel.item3.title: Execution risk signals
home.panel.item3.description: Spot fragile recommendations before they affect revenue.
home.audience.title: Built for teams that need pricing clarity without spreadsheet sprawl.
home.audience.subtitle: PricePilot fits e-commerce businesses that want faster pricing reviews, stronger margin control, and clearer decision support.
home.audience.card1.title: Founders
home.audience.card1.description: Understand how pricing changes affect growth, profit, and downside risk before you approve a move.
home.audience.card2.title: Operators
home.audience.card2.description: Keep pricing decisions aligned with inventory, returns, and day-to-day execution realities.
home.audience.card3.title: Pricing analysts
home.audience.card3.description: Compare strategies, validate assumptions, and explain recommendations with less manual work.
home.feature1.title: Compare pricing strategies before making decisions
home.feature1.description: See which pricing model creates the strongest balance of growth, margin, and risk for each product.
home.feature2.title: See profit impact instantly
home.feature2.description: Turn pricing inputs into revenue, profit, ROI, break-even, and margin signals your team can act on.
home.feature3.title: Test market conditions before you commit
home.feature3.description: Stress-test price moves across low-demand, normal, high-demand, and promotional scenarios.
home.feature4.title: Keep product decisions in one place
home.feature4.description: Track recommended moves, compare products, and build pricing history across the catalog.
home.features.title: A workflow built around pricing outcomes
home.features.subtitle: Every view is designed to answer what to price, why it works, and where the risk sits.
home.flow.title: From product inputs to a clear pricing action
home.flow.subtitle: The workflow is designed to answer the questions pricing teams ask every day.
home.flow.step1.title: Model the product
home.flow.step1.description: Enter costs, market references, demand expectations, and margin targets.
home.flow.step2.title: Compare the options
home.flow.step2.description: Evaluate six pricing strategies with a common score across profit, ROI, margin, and risk.
home.flow.step3.title: Choose the move
home.flow.step3.description: Act on the recommended price with scenario context and explainable reasoning.
home.cta.title: See where margin is strongest before you change a price.
home.cta.subtitle: Run a product analysis, compare scenarios, and move into pricing decisions with cleaner evidence.
analyze.title: Model one pricing decision at a time
analyze.subtitle: Use PricePilot to compare pricing strategies, estimate profit outcomes, and understand the tradeoffs behind each recommendation.
analyze.input_subtitle: Update the numbers that shape demand, margin, and execution risk.
analyze.results_subtitle: Review the recommended price, strategy ranking, and scenario signals before making a pricing move.
analyze.why_recommended_caption: The business case behind the current recommendation
analyze.empty_recommendation_reason: Run an analysis to see why this strategy leads.
analyze.empty_recommendation: Run an analysis to generate a recommended move.
analyze.strategy_comparison_caption: Ranked by profit, margin quality, ROI, stability, and risk
analyze.price_optimization_caption: See how profit changes as price moves
analyze.scenario_comparison_caption: Compare best outcomes across market conditions
form_hint.product_name: Use the product title your team prices against.
form_hint.category: Useful for grouping products and reviewing portfolio trends.
form_hint.unit_cost: Your landed cost per unit before pricing.
form_hint.fixed_cost: Shared overhead or fixed spend allocated to this product.
form_hint.base_price: The current or proposed selling price.
form_hint.competitor_price: The market reference customers compare against.
form_hint.base_demand: Expected unit demand before scenario adjustments.
form_hint.inventory: Units available for the period you are pricing.
form_hint.elasticity: How strongly demand changes when price moves.
form_hint.return_rate: Expected share of orders that come back.
form_hint.desired_margin: The margin threshold you want the strategy to protect.
form_hint.scenario: Choose the market condition you want to test.
api.error.invalid_payload: Invalid request data. Please refresh the page and try again.
api.error.unexpected_analysis: The analysis could not be completed. Please review the inputs and try again.
api.error.unexpected_scenario_compare: The scenario comparison could not be completed. Please review the inputs and try again.
portfolio.title: Manage pricing decisions across your product catalog
portfolio.subtitle: Compare recommended price moves, track margin performance, and keep a structured decision history for the products you manage.
portfolio.summary.total_products_note: Active products in your pricing portfolio.
portfolio.summary.projected_revenue_note: Combined revenue from the current recommendations.
portfolio.summary.projected_profit_note: Combined profit across the current recommended moves.
portfolio.summary.best_product_note: Highest projected profit based on the current recommendation.
portfolio.summary.highest_margin_note: Product with the strongest projected profit margin.
portfolio.summary.highest_risk_note: Product that needs the closest pricing review.
portfolio.form.subtitle: Save product assumptions so you can compare pricing moves across the catalog.
portfolio.list.title: Catalog Workspace
portfolio.list.subtitle: Maintain the products your team reviews most often and reopen any item in the decision engine.
portfolio.list.empty: No products yet. Add a product to start tracking pricing decisions.
portfolio.messages.not_found: The selected product could not be found.
portfolio.messages.delete_confirm: Delete this product from the portfolio?
portfolio.comparison.title: Recommended Pricing Moves
portfolio.comparison.subtitle: Compare the current leading recommendation for each product in the portfolio.
portfolio.comparison.empty: Recommendations will appear here once products are added.
portfolio.history.title: Decision History
portfolio.history.subtitle: Review past recommendations, scenarios, and risk levels in one running record.
portfolio.history.empty: No decision history yet. Run an analysis to start tracking changes.
dashboard.title: See where profit leads and where risk needs attention
dashboard.subtitle: PricePilot gives e-commerce teams a concise view of recommended strategy, margin performance, scenario pressure, and decision risk.
dashboard.module1.label: Strategy coverage
dashboard.module1.title: 6 pricing strategies evaluated
dashboard.module1.description: Compare cost-plus, competitive, demand-based, inventory-based, target-margin, and optimized recommendations side by side.

dashboard.module2.description: Review the numbers that matter when choosing a price, not just the top-line price point.

dashboard.module3.title: 4 market conditions tested
dashboard.module3.description: See how demand shifts, promotions, and market strength change the recommended pricing path.
dashboard.module4.label: Decision clarity
dashboard.module4.title: Explainable recommendations
dashboard.module4.description: Each recommendation is backed by clear reasoning, financial evidence, and visible execution risk.
dashboard.executive_brief_subtitle: A quick read on the current reference analysis.
dashboard.reference_snapshot_subtitle: A reference product view showing how PricePilot summarizes a pricing decision.
dashboard.scenario_overview_subtitle: Review the best pricing outcome in each market condition.
about.hero.title: Pricing decisions with clearer margin logic.
about.hero.subtitle: PricePilot helps e-commerce founders, operators, and pricing analysts compare price moves, understand profit impact, and act with more confidence.
about.hero.panel.title: Built for fast pricing reviews
about.hero.panel.item1.title: Compare pricing paths
about.hero.panel.item1.description: Review multiple strategies side by side before updating a product price.
about.hero.panel.item2.title: See profit before rollout
about.hero.panel.item2.description: Understand revenue, profit, margin, and ROI before the market sees the change.
about.hero.panel.item3.title: Spot operational pressure
about.hero.panel.item3.description: Track return, inventory, and risk signals alongside upside.
about.overview.title: PricePilot turns pricing analysis into a repeatable operating workflow.
about.overview.subtitle: It is designed for e-commerce teams that need better pricing decisions without rebuilding every review from scratch.
about.overview.body1: The platform combines pricing strategy comparison, profit modeling, scenario testing, and explainable recommendations in one product experience.
about.overview.body2: That means teams can move from raw product inputs to a confident pricing direction faster, with clearer visibility into margin quality and execution risk.
about.overview.card1.title: Make pricing easier to review
about.overview.card1.description: Keep the metrics, strategy ranking, and scenario view in a format decision-makers can scan quickly.
about.overview.card2.title: Reduce manual pricing work
about.overview.card2.description: Spend less time rebuilding spreadsheet logic and more time pressure-testing decisions.
about.overview.card3.title: Act with better margin visibility
about.overview.card3.description: See whether a recommendation improves profitability without hiding the tradeoffs.
about.capabilities.title: What teams use PricePilot to do
about.capabilities.subtitle: The product is built for day-to-day pricing decisions across single products and multi-product portfolios.
about.capabilities.item1.title: Evaluate product economics
about.capabilities.item1.description: Model pricing using product costs, competitor context, demand assumptions, and margin targets.
about.capabilities.item2.title: Compare strategy outcomes
about.capabilities.item2.description: Review which pricing path creates the strongest balance of growth, profitability, and risk.
about.capabilities.item3.title: Understand profit impact
about.capabilities.item3.description: See how price moves affect revenue, margin, ROI, and break-even before rollout.
about.capabilities.item4.title: Test market conditions
about.capabilities.item4.description: Pressure-test recommendations across low, normal, high, and promotional scenarios.
about.capabilities.item5.title: Track portfolio decisions
about.capabilities.item5.description: Compare products, review recommendations, and keep pricing history in one place.
about.capabilities.item6.title: Explain the recommendation
about.capabilities.item6.description: Share a concise rationale for why one pricing direction leads the field.
about.help.title: Built for pricing teams that need answers, not extra complexity
about.help.subtitle: PricePilot keeps the workflow focused on the commercial decision.
about.help.card.title: What changes with PricePilot
about.help.card.paragraph1: Teams can review cost structure, competitor context, demand sensitivity, and scenario pressure without spreading the work across multiple tools.
about.help.card.paragraph2: The result is a cleaner path from analysis to action, with explainable recommendations that are easier to review with stakeholders.
about.help.list.item1: Turn product and market inputs into a structured pricing view.
about.help.list.item2: Compare pricing options without rebuilding analysis from scratch.
about.help.list.item3: See likely profit and margin impact before execution.
about.help.list.item4: Review downside risk next to upside potential.
about.help.point1.title: Less manual work
about.help.point1.description: Reduce time spent rebuilding calculations and one-off spreadsheet logic.
about.help.point2.title: Faster scenario review
about.help.point2.description: Move from pricing question to evaluated options in a single workflow.
about.help.point3.title: Clearer stakeholder updates
about.help.point3.description: Give teams a concise view of why the recommended price makes sense.
about.foundation.title: Designed for speed, clarity, and confidence
about.foundation.subtitle: Every page is structured to keep pricing reviews readable on desktop and mobile.
about.foundation.item1.label: Modeling
about.foundation.item1.title: Consistent financial logic
about.foundation.item1.description: Recommendations are evaluated against the same profitability, margin, and risk framework.
about.foundation.item2.label: Workflow
about.foundation.item2.title: Fast product review
about.foundation.item2.description: Inputs, results, and comparisons stay close together so pricing decisions move faster.
about.foundation.item3.label: Visibility
about.foundation.item3.title: Decision-ready reporting
about.foundation.item3.description: Charts, KPI cards, and summaries emphasize what to do next.
about.closing.title: Better pricing decisions start with clearer tradeoffs.
about.closing.subtitle: Use PricePilot to compare strategies, protect margin, and move on pricing with stronger evidence.
js.highlight_summary: {strategy} currently leads at {price} with the strongest balance of profit, margin, and risk.
js.why_reason_score: It leads the full strategy set on decision score ({score}).
js.why_reason_financial: It projects {profit} profit, {margin}% margin, and {roi}% ROI.
js.why_reason_comparison: It stays ahead of {next_strategy} by {score_gap} decision points in the current analysis.
js.why_reason_stability: It keeps a cross-scenario stability score of {stability_score}.
js.score_breakdown_note: Score drivers: profit {profit}, margin {margin}, ROI {roi}, risk-adjusted {risk}, stability {stability}.
explanation.title: Recommended pricing move for {product}
explanation.summary: PricePilot recommends {strategy} at ${price} for {product} because it delivers the strongest balance of profit, margin, ROI, and {risk_level} execution risk.
explanation.detail.selection: The leading strategy is {strategy} at ${price}. It projects ${revenue} in revenue and ${profit} in profit.
explanation.detail.metrics: Expected profit margin is {profit_margin}%, contribution margin is {contribution_margin}%, ROI is {roi}%, and execution risk is {risk_level} ({risk_score}/100).
explanation.detail.elasticity: Elasticity is {elasticity}, which means demand is sensitive to price movement. At the recommended price, modeled demand shifts by {elasticity_effect}% versus the blended market reference.
explanation.detail.scenario: In the {scenario} scenario, adjusted demand is {adjusted_demand} units, competitor reference price is ${competitor_price}, unit cost is ${adjusted_unit_cost}, and return rate is {adjusted_return_rate}%.
explanation.detail.preference: It stays ahead of {next_best_strategy} by {score_gap} decision points, changes expected profit by ${profit_gap}, and changes risk by {risk_gap} points versus the next-best option.
explanation.detail.stability: Across all scenarios, the same price averages ${mean_profit} profit with a profit standard deviation of ${profit_std_dev}. That results in a stability score of {stability_score}.
explanation.detail.break_even.none: Break-even is not reached because the recommended price does not cover variable cost.
explanation.detail.break_even.inside: Break-even is estimated at {break_even_units} units, which stays within the current inventory of {inventory} units.
explanation.detail.break_even.outside: Break-even is estimated at {break_even_units} units, which exceeds the current inventory of {inventory} units and raises execution risk.
explanation.caution.medium: This recommendation carries moderate execution risk and should be monitored after rollout.
explanation.caution.high: This recommendation carries high execution risk and should be rolled out carefully with closer oversight.
